name: button
title: Button
description: An iOS-style button with spring physics scaling, magnetic pull, and 3D specular light glare reflections.

name: button-group
title: Button Group
description: Combines multiple nested Buttons together into a single fluid Segmented Bar.

name: card
title: Card
description: A tactile card layout container with customizable header, content, and footer sections.

name: dialog
title: Dialog
description: A highly tactile, accessible modal system prompt mimicking native iOS dialogue designs.

name: dropdown-menu
title: Dropdown Menu
description: A modular glassmorphic popup containing list hooks, short-cuts, checkboxes, and sub-menu branches.

name: glass-view
title: Glass View
description: Core depth primitive container styled with specular boundaries and inertia drag rotation physics.

name: input
title: Input
description: Text input component with focus borders, specular highlights, and clean clear wiggles.

name: input-group
title: Input Group
description: Unifies inputs, addons, and triggers into a single rounded magnetic and specular capsule framework.

name: list
title: List
description: Standard iOS replica settings list layouts with divided headers, options rows, and toggling fields.

name: select
title: Select
description: A glassmorphic selection wrapper built with robust Bits UI interactive features.

name: separator
title: Separator
description: Semantic horizontal or vertical layout dividing line.

name: sheet
title: Sheet
description: Apple-style multi-directional sheet panels that slide fluidly from the out-of-bounds edges of the viewport.

name: slider
title: Slider
description: Tactile slider range input built with Bits UI primitives.

name: switch
title: Switch
description: Satisfying iOS toggling control with soft spring-animated knob slides.

name: navigation-stack
title: Navigation Stack
description: Scaffolding architecture that coordinates dynamic intersection blurred-out header shifts.
